message:
style(discord,figma,m365): apply rustfmt and update figma interface hash

Reformat long lines in discord, figma, and microsoft365 connectors.
Switch discord gateway test from tokio::net::TcpListener to
fcp_async_core::net::TcpListener. Update figma manifest interface_hash
to reflect current operation set.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
